历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 5938 → 6975 → 7870 → 15727 → 8125. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking dropped significantly, but rebounded to 8125 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 8125. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou's science/physics category was 51 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 73 in 2024, 79 in 2025, and 85 in 2026, an increase of 6 students (+7.6%) compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has continuously improved from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. There are no negative public opinion records for Minzu University of China in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal application heat signals. It has A+ in Ethnology (top in China), A- in Chinese Language and Literature, and A- in Sociology. Among these, Sociology and Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature) are enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in the liberal arts direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are rated as 'highly recommended', and Law is 'recommended', all of which are science enrollment majors, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is about 209,300 (estimated based on recent proportions), slightly increased from 207,200 in 2025. The provincial control line (physics category undergraduate batch) rose from 380 in 2024 to 387 in 2025, indicating a tightening competitive environment. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment in Guizhou's science/physics category accounts for a small proportion (about 80+ students), typical of an out-of-province 985 university's enrollment scale, with regional preference having a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound of the ranking to 8125 in 2025, the increased attractiveness from the continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking (103→79), and the tightening competition due to the rising provincial control line and slight increase in candidates, although the 7.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 provides some relief, the overall competitive pressure is still on an upward trend. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 8395, with a range of 7895–8895.

- Electronic Information Category (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)

If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7500), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Category and Electronic Information Category. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 8800), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 762 → 1080 → 1491 → 3144 → 2284, showing an overall backward trend. 学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 80th with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, and Sociology is A-. Among these, Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature A-), Sociology (Sociology A-), and Ethnology (A+) are all liberal arts enrollment majors at this university, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, and Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is also recommended, both being popular liberal arts enrollment majors at this university. 预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of the 2025 ranking to 2284, the continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking (103→79) enhancing attractiveness, the significant increase in the provincial control line (442→458) intensifying competition, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature, although the 13.5% expansion in 2026 has a mitigating effect, the overall competitive pressure still shows a slight upward trend.
